Title: Azure Update 16th April 2026
Author: John Savill's Technical Training
Description:
Quick update and sorry about location :-)

00:00 - Introduction 00:15 - New videos 01:09 - StandardV2 NAT Gateway as outbound for AKS 01:34 - Azure Monitor OpenTelemetry support for AKS workloads 02:20 - Azure Bastion MI for graphical session recording 02:53 - ASR NVMe disk controller support 03:04 - Azure Batch HBv2/HC/NP retirement 03:21 - Azure Files granular encryption-in-transit 03:48 - Azure Storage Mover in gov cloud 03:58 - Azure File Sync new regions 04:24 - Smart Tier for storage 05:12 - Minimum billable object size for cooler storage tiers 05:47 - Encrypt Premium SSDv2 and Ultra with cross-tenant CMK 06:17 - Event Grid Stripe event ingestion 07:02 - Azure Managed Grafana Basic SKU retirement 07:18 - MAI-Image-2-Efficient 07:48 - Close
